data.name: label17.Text
data.value: 1 skill por linha (prioridade de cima para baixo)

data.name: lblTrainingRecoveryHint.Text
data.value: Use one line per item in HP:ItemName or SP:ItemName format.

data.name: lblTrainingBuffItemsHint.Text
data.value: One item per line. The bot tries to reuse it when the item buff expires.

data.name: lblTrainingSkillsHint.Text
data.value: One skill per line. Use the internal skill name.

data.name: lblTrainingInfo.Text
data.value: Exclusive mode. Skills, buff consumables, recovery, and auto attack only work while dismounted.
